description_long: This guard rail consists of four horizontal white rails mounted onto three vertical brown posts. The rails are evenly spaced and appear to be made of painted or coated wood or metal, giving a clean, modern look. The posts are rectangular in cross-section and provide sturdy support for the rails, with the central post slightly offset from the midpoint. The ends of the rails are flush with the outer posts, and there are no visible end treatments or reflective markings. The construction suggests it is designed for light to moderate impact, suitable for urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or residential streets. The overall finish is smooth and the color contrast between the white rails and brown posts enhances visibility.
description: A modern guard rail with four white horizontal rails and three brown vertical posts, featuring a clean, smooth finish and no visible end treatments or markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four white rails and three brown posts, with the central post slightly offset.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the rails and posts, with minimal depth visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the same rail and post arrangement as the front, with the rails flush to the posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slim profile and alignment of the rails and posts.
